Bash([Asset Name]"
- Action buttons \(Edit, Share, More\) before close button
- Visual separator between actions and close button
- Higher z-index \(1450\) ensures it covers Inspect toolbar

Smart Dual-Close Logic:
- Tracks whether asset was opened via inspect vs. explorer
- Closing Asset Details when opened via inspect closes both drawers
- Closing Asset Explorer when Asset Details is open closes both drawers
- Clicking scrim when both drawers open closes both sequentially
- All dual-close actions use sequential concertina animation

Sequential Concertina Animation:
- Asset Details slides left first \(300ms\)
- Asset Explorer slides left second \(after 300ms delay\)
- Creates smooth, polished closing effect

Edge Cases Covered:
- Inspect mode disabled when opening explorer
- Scrim click handles both single and dual drawer states
- All close buttons check context before closing
- State properly tracked for inspect vs. explorer workflows

All transitions use smooth cubic-bezier easing for premium feel.
